name: StackLens
description: Analyzes stack traces and error logs. Returns root cause, severity, code fix, and documentation links. Supports Python, JavaScript, TypeScript, Java, Go, Rust, SQL, Docker, and C/C++.

tools.name: explain_error
tools.description: Analyzes a single stack trace or error message

prompts.name: debug
prompts.description: Slash command to quickly explain an error
